info.name: {{REPO_SLUG}} — health & readiness
info.description: AKOS-blessed Postman collection for {{REPO_SLUG}}. Maintained via the Postman MCP per `postman/README.md`. Endpoints listed here are guaranteed by the AKOS posture check; new ones must be added by PR.

request.description: Liveness probe — returns 200 when the process is up.
Readiness probe — returns 200 only when downstream dependencies (DB, queues, third-party APIs) are reachable.
Public status payload — version, build sha, deploy time, freshness ribbon data.
